versions.version_description: Flawless pop-funk fusion from Diana and Nile here. Brilliant use of modulation. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords and nuances. Choruses play as intro. Outro plays as into repeating to fade over funk guitar figures.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
I said, upside down you're turning me, [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
you're giving love instinctively. [/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
around and round you're turning me. [/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
Upside down, boy, you turn me, [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
inside out and round and round. [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
inside out and round and round. [/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
       Instinctively you give to me the love that I need, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
I cherish the moments with you. [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Respectfully I see to thee, I'm aware that you're cheating, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
but no one makes me feel like you do. [/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
    I know you got charm and appeal, you always play the field, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
I'm crazy to think you are mine. [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
As long as the sun continues to shine, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
there's a place in my heart for you, that's the bottomline. [/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch]
       Instinctively you give to me the love that I need, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
I cherish the moments with you. [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Respectfully I see to thee, I'm aware that you're cheating, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
but no one makes me feel like you do. [/tab]

(Chorus x2)

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]
Upside down you're turning me, you're giving love instinctively. [/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]A[/ch]
around and round you're turning me, [/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
I say to thee respectfully [/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
I say to thee respectfully [/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
I say to thee respectfully [/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
I say to thee respectfully[/tab]
